pi_items.source: Task description and database field names (fri_c = Friday closing, fri_o = Friday opening)
setup_task.sh:15 and export_result.sh:19 - SQL queries use 'fri_c' to select/update Friday closing time from practiceinfo table
verifier.py:47 hardcodes expected_fri_close = '13:00' (1:00 PM in 24-hour format)
verifier.py:48 hardcodes expected_fri_close_sql = '13:00:00' (SQL TIME format with seconds)
setup_task.sh:15 and setup_nosh.sh:194 both initialize fri_c='17:00' (5:00 PM) as the starting value before task execution
setup_task.sh:15 and setup_nosh.sh:194 initialize mon_c='17:00' (Monday closing time, used as control field to ensure it remains unchanged)
setup_task.sh:15 and setup_nosh.sh:194 initialize fri_o='08:00' (Friday opening time, used as control field to ensure it remains unchanged)

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified and correct. The task targets the Friday closing time field (fri_c) in the NOSH practiceinfo database table. The initial value is 17:00 (5:00 PM), and the expected new value is 13:00 (1:00 PM, representing Summer Fridays). Control fields verify that Monday closing time (mon_c) remains at 17:00 and Friday opening time (fri_o) remains at 08:00. The database is NOSH ChartingSystem with synthetic healthcare data created by environment setup scripts and Synthea patient generator.
